description: The tempered quality of steadfast, mindful endurance. It is not a grim struggle, but a calm and persistent resolve to continue on a path, fueled by deep purpose rather than forceful will.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'the' (deliberate consideration) and 'nu' (deep purpose, grounding). The word's structure means 'deliberate, deep purpose.' The contemplative fricative 'th' combined with the grounding nasal 'n' creates a sound of quiet, unshakable resolve.
